title: Horitsushiki's Advanced Visual Enhancer
description: This modpack adds atmospheric visual mods such as fresh animations, various particle effect mods, and performance mods such as sodium, lithium, and more.
body: This pack improves the basic visual effects in minecraft, along with ambient sounds, and preformance increases. this is done through visual mods like iris shaders, particle rain, LambDynamicLights. Performance is increased with mods that cull entites and mods like lithium, sodium, etc.
